##MEMBER CONSOL00
INIT     CMDDELIM(")
         MLIM(1500)
         APPLID(SMCS&SYSCLONE.)
         MONITOR(DSNAME)
         MPF(00)
         PFK(00)
         RLIM(10)
         UEXIT(N)
         CNGRP(00)
         AMRF(N)
DEFAULT ROUTCODE(ALL)
CONSOLE
  DEVNUM(SMCS)
  AUTH(ALL)
  LOGON(REQUIRED)
  CON(N)
  DEL(R)
  MFORM(J,T)
  MONITOR(JOBNAMES-T)
  NAME(SMCS01)
  PFKTAB(PFKTAB1)
  RNUM(19)
  ROUTCODE(ALL)
  RTME(1)
  SEG(14)
CONSOLE
  DEVNUM(700)
  AUTH(MASTER)
  CON(N)
  DEL(R)
  MFORM(J,T)
  MONITOR(JOBNAMES-T)
  NAME(Z31L700)
  PFKTAB(PFKTAB1)
  RNUM(19)
  ROUTCODE(ALL)
  RTME(1)
  SEG(14)
  UNIT(3270-X)
CONSOLE
  DEVNUM(908)
  AUTH(MASTER)
  CON(N)
  DEL(R)
  MFORM(J,T)
  MONITOR(JOBNAMES-T)
  NAME(C908)
  PFKTAB(PFKTAB1)
  RNUM(19)
  ROUTCODE(ALL)
  RTME(1)
  SEG(14)
  UNIT(3270-X)
CONSOLE   DEVNUM(SYSCONS) LEVEL(ALL)
       NAME(HWCI) AUTH(MASTER) ROUTCODE(ALL)
CONSOLE
  DEVNUM(SUBSYSTEM)
  NAME(SUBS)
  AUTH(ALL)
CONSOLE
  DEVNUM(SUBSYSTEM)
  AUTH(ALL)
  NAME(S908)
HARDCOPY
  DEVNUM(SYSLOG,OPERLOG)
  CMDLEVEL(CMDS)
  ROUTCODE(ALL)
